videos.description:

videos.title: I Tested a 10-Day Reels-Only System (The Results Surprised Me)
videos.description:
I gave myself three rules: under one hour per week, content stays human, AI runs the system (not the creativity). Here's what happened.

THE EXPERIMENT SETUP: Ran the system three times over ten days. Picked one core business problem, explained it in three proven Reel formats, posted daily at consistent times. Then ran data through AI to spot patterns, made one small change, ran the next batch.
